workflows.name: Site Build & Deployment
workflows.trigger: Manual Git Commit & Push / Build command
steps: Checks static assets and compile paths.

workflows.name: Sitemap Update Flow
workflows.trigger: Adding a new course, program, or blog article
steps: Determine the target sub-sitemap (e.g., sitemap-courses.xml for courses, sitemap-blog.xml for articles).
Add the new absolute URL to the sub-sitemap XML list with appropriate loc, lastmod, and changefreq tags.
Verify the sub-sitemap is listed in the main sitemap.xml index.
Regenerate site cache and verify robots.txt links.

workflows.name: Regional Hub Generation (Paused)
workflows.status: Paused (curriculum hub pages are statically maintained; localized city directories are consolidated to reduce crawl budget waste)
